overall.description: First-person walk through a cyberpunk-style neon-lit indoor corridor, featuring vibrant pink and blue neon signage, promotional posters, and intricate wall patterns. The footage displays high-quality game engine rendering characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077, with the camera moving steadily through an entertainment venue or nightclub corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk nightclub entrance with promotional posters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the entrance corridor, passing illuminated posters and neon signage on the walls

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with blue and pink gender symbols mounted on the wall
three illuminated vertical posters featuring character artwork and text
dark doorway with horizontal yellow light strip above the frame
pink upward-facing light fixture casting glow on the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk corridor with dark industrial walls. A prominent neon gender symbol sign glows in pink and blue on the right wall, alongside illuminated promotional posters. The camera moves forward past a dark doorway on the left, revealing the entrance to a neon-lit entertainment venue.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with vertical neon light strips

events.description: passes the entrance wall and enters the main corridor with vertical neon lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor toward a distant figure, passing vertical neon strips on the right wall

notable_agents.action: standing still at the end of the corridor facing the camera

entered.detail: series of bright pink vertical neon tube lights mounted on the right wall
wall section with intricate white circular patterns illuminated by pink light
exposed industrial piping and ductwork running along the ceiling
metal drainage grate running along the right edge of the floor

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the venue, the corridor extends with bright vertical pink neon strips illuminating intricate wall patterns on the right. The entrance signage falls behind as industrial ceiling pipes become visible overhead. A lone figure stands at the far end of the corridor, and the camera approaches while passing detailed wall carvings glowing under the neon light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark industrial corridor that gradually transforms into a brightly lit, neon-infused entertainment venue. It begins in a narrow passage where a pink and blue neon gender symbol and illuminated posters glow against dark walls, passing a shadowed doorway on the left. As the camera moves deeper into the venue, the lighting shifts to vibrant vertical pink neon strips that highlight intricate patterns and carvings on the right wall. The scene then expands to reveal industrial piping overhead as the initial signage recedes into the distance. Finally, the camera advances toward a lone figure standing at the far end of the corridor, drawing closer through the saturated neon glow.
